animal_q2.title: 2. Will any DOD-funded animal studies be performed at a site outside the US?
animal_q2.description: If yes, please provide details in note below

animal_q3.title: 3. Will any DOD-funded animal studies be performed at a site in a foreign country of concern (FCOC)?
animal_q3.description: If yes or unknown, please ensure you provide details to DHACA in the 'Other' box of your negotiation notes and alert RISG

animal_q4.title: 4. Has a valid IACUC protocol approval been obtained or submitted?

animal_q5.title: 5. Does this project involve endangered or protected species?

animal_start_date.title: 6. Estimated Animal Research Start (if known)
animal_start_date.description: Example: Animal research will start right away
